meaning: n.无效,废弃,取消,使无价值,使变的无用
examples: But this nullification does not affect the validity of the entire air transport contract.
The nullification system of insurance contract is not quite perfect in the insurance law of our country.
Finally let us consider a case in which the opponent is downed by the nullification of his resistance to gravity.
Those skeptical of nullification might cite the defense of the doctrine by John C.
Nullification is to be opposed because some of its defenders were also slave owners and slavery apologists.
